title: Export shows success before data is ready
description: The UI claims an export is complete while the server job is only queued.
requirement: REQ-UX-3: The dashboard must not tell a user an export is ready until a downloadable file exists; queued work must be labelled as processing.

expectedFindings.title: Queued export is presented as ready
expectedFindings.description: The success toast is displayed immediately after queueing and promises a download that does not yet exist.
